diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 375 lines, exports class and functions
+- Neighbor files: imports Hono from ../../hono, types from ../../types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono app instances and handlers with typed interfaces for 1-10 handler combinations
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 141 lines, Context utility
+- Neighbor files: imports Context from ../../context, types from ../../types, url utils from ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Runtime route inspection utilities for getting matched route info within handlers
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 140 lines, WebSocket upgrade helper
+- Neighbor files: imports Context from ../../context, types from ../../types, status codes from ../../utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper for defining event handlers and managing WebSocket connections
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 145 lines, cookie manipulation utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports Context from ../../context, cookie utils from ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie set/get/signed utilities with support for __Secure- and __Host- prefixed cookies
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 27 lines, client for testing
+- Neighbor files: imports client from ../../client, Hono from ../../hono, types from ../../types, context from ../../context
+- Safe summary: Creates typed HTTP client for testing Hono applications
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 90 lines, runtime detection utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports Context from ../../context
+- Safe summary: Detects execution runtime (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light) and provides environment access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 252 lines, experimental CSS-in-JS helper
+- Neighbor files: imports html helper from ../../helper/html, jsx constants from ../../jsx/constants, css dom objects from ../../jsx/dom/css, types from ./common
+- Safe summary: Experimental CSS-in-JS engine with class name generation, keyframes, and view transitions for Hono
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, toHash, minify
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 328 lines, shared CSS utilities
+- Neighbor files: referenced by index.ts, provides core functions and type definitions
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utility functions including hash generation, minification, and shared CSS helpers
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, HTTPException
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 190 lines, HTTP proxy utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports HTTPException from ../../http-exception, headers from ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper with RFC 9110 compliance, hop-by-hop header filtering, and header manipulation
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 79 lines, development utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports Hono from ../../hono, types from ../../types, color utils from ../../utils/color, handler utils from ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Development utilities for displaying route information and router names with optional colorization
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 57 lines, HTML string utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports html utils from ../../utils/html
+- Safe summary: Template string tag for creating escaped HTML strings with callback support
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: exports from ./ssg, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 14 lines, SSG aggregator
+- Neighbor files: re-exports from ./ssg, ./middleware, and ./plugins
+- Safe summary: Static site generation helper that exports main SSG functions and middleware utilities
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 470 lines, core SSG logic
+- Neighbor files: imports client utils from ../../client/utils, Hono from ../../hono, types from ../../types, concurrent utils from ../../utils/concurrent, mime utils from ../../utils/mime, and ./middleware, ./utils, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: Static site generation engine for fetching routes, generating content, and saving to filesystem
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 87 lines, path utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports Hono from ../../hono, router from ../../router, types from ../../types, handler utils from ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation including dynamic route detection and static content filtering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 83 lines, SSG middleware utilities
+- Neighbor files: imports Context from ../../context, types from ../../types, and isDynamicRoute from ./utils
+- Safe summary: Middleware for controlling SSG execution and managing SSG context state
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: TypeScript module, 9 lines, streaming aggregator
+- Neighbor files: re-exports from ./stream, ./sse, and ./text
+- Safe summa
